headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://apis.google.com https://www.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseapp.com wss://*.firebaseio.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: *; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com;
